name: Brazilian Rare Earths Limited
analysis: Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$5.5460. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$5.5062 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$5.5460, stop A$4.7025, target A$5.7500. Risk/reward is 0.24:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
